Selected gpt-5-mini. The amount '1.18.1' is clearly visible embedded in the description. gpt-5-mini correctly extracted this as 1 pound, 18 shillings, 1 pence. claude-haiku failed to extract the amount, deeming it 'embedded notes rather than standard currency format' and marking it unreadable, despite the instruction to extract embedded values.
Visual inspection indicates 'Calcott Ann.' (with a fancy 'C'). claude-haiku's 'Callett Ann' is closer than gpt-5-mini's 'Talcott Ann'. Both correctly identified no amount in columns.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Verman for Batts due to ye Coll. and for so much pd to Mr Berry ye Brewer
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. Its description is accurate, and it correctly extracted the amount '13.17.10'. claude-haiku's description had several transcription errors and it only extracted shillings, noting ambiguity for pence which were actually clear.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Hutchins Bursar for Increments
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. Its description is accurate, and it correctly extracted the amount '12.12.9'. claude-haiku's description had transcription errors and it only extracted shillings, missing pounds and pence.

rows.description: Recd for Genl. Commoners of Mr Vincent & Mr Tresby & Mr Davie & Mr Arscott & Mr Baber
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. Its description is accurate, and it correctly extracted the amount '40.00.0'. claude-haiku fragmented this single logical line into two separate rows (32 and 33) and had transcription errors in its description, though it correctly identified 40 pounds for its first fragmented part.

rows.description: Mrs for Act supper; and Mr Lane 2t Mr Marker 2t
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. Its description is accurate ('Mrs' vs 'mos', 'Lane' vs 'Laze') and it correctly extracted the amount '04.00.0'. claude-haiku misread the pounds amount as '24' instead of '4'.

rows.description: Backhs for Legg Saturday and Apr Wednesday
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. Its description is accurate and it correctly extracted the amount '2.08.00'. claude-haiku had a completely different and inaccurate description for this row and failed to extract any amount.

rows.description: Sr Potbury 2t Sr Orchard 2t Sr Gee 2t Sr Pennington 2t
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description as it is more accurate ('Sr Potbury' vs 'St Pillbury'). Both correctly identified no consolidated amount for this row. claude-haiku's notes incorrectly associated a later amount ('0.8 00') with this row.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Hutchins for ye Comoners Library
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. It correctly identified this distinct row and extracted the amount '0.8.0'. claude-haiku missed this distinct entry entirely, incorrectly embedding its amount into the previous row's notes.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Hutchins for increments for ½ year July 16th 1701
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. Its description (implied '½ year') and amount '27.2.0' are accurate. claude-haiku misread the year as '1901' and only extracted shillings, missing pounds and pence.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Hutchins for ye Comoners Library
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini. It correctly identified this distinct row, noting it was 'partially crossed and faded', and extracted the amount '19.0.0'. claude-haiku missed this distinct entry entirely.

rows.description: Recd of mr Hutchings for yt Comoners [...]
rows.notes: Both extractors correctly identified no amount for this very faint and largely illegible line.
